title: Abandoned Trip Settings
description: Configuration settings for abandoned trip handling.

abandonedTripInactivityMinutes.title: Abandoned Trip Inactivity Minutes
abandonedTripInactivityMinutes.description: Number of inactive minutes after which a trip is marked as abandoned. Allowed range is 30 to 240 minutes.

enableCustomerBlockingForAbandonedTrips.title: Enable Customer Blocking For Abandoned Trips
enableCustomerBlockingForAbandonedTrips.description: When true, customers with abandoned trips are blocked.
